extraction.one_line_summary: QUINTANA Nairo won Stage 9 after a mass Team Sky crash eliminated LANDA Mikel and THOMAS Geraint, attacking late to take 28s GC lead.
tactical_patterns: Movistar accelerated immediately before crash that took down Sky, suggesting pre-planned pressure point at dangerous narrow section.
DUMOULIN Tom isolated without team support still limited losses to winner by only 24s, signaling exceptional diesel engine.
MOLLEMA Bauke refused to share pace with DUMOULIN despite mutual interest, revealing teams prioritize relative GC gaps over cooperation.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: seized crash opportunity immediately with decisive attack, race-specific games training translated to clinical execution
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: limited stage loss to 24s without teammates on steep finish despite being 'big man', expects to reclaim lead in upcoming TT
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: race ended in crash, over 5 minutes down eliminates GC ambitions before rest day
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: caught in team crash, race ambitions finished despite remounting, loses over 5 minutes
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: imposed himself on climb to finish second, only 28s down on GC shows genuine stage race form
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: rode to absolute limit but smart enough to refuse cooperation with DUMOULIN, 51s down GC keeps podium hopes alive
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: fifth at 1+ minute suggests controlled damage limitation rather than contention on steep finish
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: caught in mass crash that destroyed Sky's stage, compromised GC position
